content.rendered:
Kosher Sushi in Baltimore

Located in the heart of the Jewish community in Pikesville, Maryland,  Sushi Seven has been known as Baltimores best Kosher Sushi. Our Seven Mile Market location offers a variety of raw, cooked & specialized rolls. Our friendly sushi chefs cater to the customers needs and can individualize rolls according to the customers request. Seven Seas has also catered many weddings and events, such as events at the Melon Center, Aipac events and the White House Chanukah Party. As always we thrive on Customer service and look to provide each customer with great products satisfaction.

please enter your order in message section below

DOWNLOAD OUR MENU
